name: tag-select
title: Tag Select
author: mcpcn
description: Colored tag selector with single or multiple selection and color variants.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release with color variants and multi-select
changelog.1.1.0: Moved to selection category for better organization
changelog.1.1.1: Updated Props interface with decorative header and sub-parameter JSDoc documentation
changelog.1.1.2: Fixed defensive property access to handle empty objects and null values
changelog.2.0.0: BREAKING: Removed onSelectTags action. Tag toggling is now internal.
changelog.2.0.1: Removed default content data - component only renders explicitly provided data
changelog.2.0.2: Fixed stale controlled state sync for selectedTagIds
changelog.2.0.3: Fixed infinite re-render loop when control prop is not provided
changelog.2.1.0: Added demo data defaults - component renders demo content when no data prop is provided
